details.test: Task 1: Join as full-time sworn officer with cheapest monthly dues under $55
Task 2: Register for earliest in-person 'Officer Safety' training
Task 3: Save health plan with lowest annual deductible under $180
Task 4: Submit scheduling grievance for overnight shift 2025-01-15
Task 5: Send contract question message to District 3 representative
Task 6: RSVP to next weekday evening meeting-like event and add to My Events/My Trainings
Task 7: Setup $40 recurring monthly PAC donation using Union Card
Task 8: Save discipline-related article from latest CBA to Saved Articles
Task 9: Update profile ZIP, communication prefs, interests, and emergency alerts
